name: subagent-artifact

defaults.artifact_format: Markdown with stable headings and preserved evidence.
defaults.write_policy: Prepare content for the artifact path and state whether the caller should write, append, or review before writing.
defaults.validation_policy: List checks the caller should run before accepting the artifact; distinguish required checks from optional review.

template: pi -p --model {model} --thinking {thinking} {tools?--tools:--no-tools} {tools} Prepare a durable artifact. Target path: {artifact_path}. Format: {artifact_format}. Write policy: {write_policy}. Validation policy: {validation_policy}. Input: {input}
